query: I’m really disappointed to hear that. I’m not happy with the service I received regarding the insurance, and I don’t think it’s fair that I can’t get a refund without canceling my flight. Is there any way to escalate this or speak to someone who can help me further?

user: The user objects to the policy and explicitly asks whether the issue can be escalated or handed to someone else.

candidate_answers.text: I’m sorry this has been frustrating. I’ll transfer you to a human agent for further assistance.
